name: Country Tales: Wild West
short_description: Step into the Wild West with Country Tales — a heartwarming time-management strategy game. Help a group of friends rebuild Sunset Hills, explore charming frontier towns, gather resources, trade, complete quests and much more!
detailed_description:
Step into the Wild West with Country Tales — a heartwarming time-management strategy game. Help Ted, Catherine, and friends rebuild Sunset Hills, explore charming frontier towns, gather resources, trade, complete quests, and thwart a corrupt mayor’s ambitious plans.

🎯 Dozens of levels packed with city building fun

🏰 Build, upgrade, and defend your towns

⚡ Use powerful boosts & unlock achievements

🎧 Intriguing narrative — a plot with twists and memorable characters.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to gather resources, build houses, manage workers, and keep your people thriving as you progress through each level. Use boosts when things get tough — but the real reward is mastering strategy and efficiency!

🎮 Play your way

Expand, optimize, upgrade, and develop your settlements the way you like. Customizable challenge — Relaxed, Standard, and Extreme difficulty modes. Earn Achievements as you complete objectives and perfect your strategy.

🌌 Immersive adventure

The mix of colorful art, atmosphere, and story-rich progression paired with satisfying time-management and city-building mechanics. Whether you enjoy calm, casual resource gathering or intense strategic challenges — this game delivers both.

  • HELP Ted & Catherine and friends in their adventures

  • EXPLORE the Wild West in this fun and addictive time management game

  • MEET peculiar character and follow the exciting story

  • Will Ted and Catherine fall IN LOVE?

  • PUT the bad guys where they belong - behind bars!

  • 40 EXCITING levels to master and HUNDREDS of quests

  • 3 DIFFICULTY MODES: relaxed, timed and extreme

  • FIND hidden treasures

  • WIN achievements

  • GORGEOUS high definition visuals and animations

  • Step-by-step tutorials for beginners

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Korean, Polish, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
